programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Eversince
programme.desc: Can you remember the moment you knew you were hooked on snowboarding? 'Eversince' is a film about the first time, and chasing the unforgettable feeling every time after. Featuring: Lucas Debari, Jason Robinson, Keegan Valaika, Lizard King, Manuel Diaz, Bode Merrill, Nicolas Müller, Fredi Kalbermatten, Cale Zima, Brandon Cocard.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 1
programme.desc: Your friends at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 2
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 3
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 4
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 01
programme.desc: Kimmy Fasani is a world class athlete, a loving mother, a natural leader, and a true champion of women in professional snowboarding. In Episode 1 of her Microdose series, we learn where Fasani’s glorious story begins. Featuring Shannon Dunn, Donna Carpenter, Hana Beaman, Gabe Taylor and Ryan Runke.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we learn how Kimmy Fasani stepped away from the contest scene and into backcountry snowboarding with help from shred legend Devun Walsh and innovator Iikka Backstrom. Featuring Chris Benchetler, Devun Walsh, Adam Moran, Bryan Knox and Peter Morning.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 03
programme.desc: As a Burton athlete, Kimmy Fasani has long been a champion of change in women's snowboarding. Innovative products. Fair pay. Better contracts. Sick ripping. Watch and be uplifted. Featuring Hana Beaman, Pat Bridges, Danny Davis, Gabe Taylor, Kevin Pearce, Bryan Knox, Adam Moran and Peter Morning.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: When resistance fades, growth begins. AfterForever is a meditation on change, exploring evolution in snowboarding and life, and asking what happens when one chapter ends and another begins.

programme.title: Wash'Dup
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this mockumentary film will follow a group of ex- snowboard filmmakers and ex-pro riders who never hung it up. Still in love with the sport and fueled by mid life crisis, these shred for lifers are extremely vulnerable to delusions of grandeur. But the dream is always “still alive” in their minds. In turn they ignore all the red flags and continue to do what seems completely irrational to everyone except for them. After a 16 year hiatus, they irresponsibly put their adult obligations behind, and join a pact to make just one last movie. But they are missing a solid presence of youth to make their movie marketable. As a remedy they end up filming with riders that span 2 generations. This unlikely alliance leads them to discover much more about snowboarding and themselves by living the snowboarding dream through an ageless lens. Filled with sketch comedy skits, this film expresses the nuanced story of a young sport reaching a level of maturity the current industry now begins to embrace. From the death of the snowboard shop, and extinction of film media, to the old pro struggling to find their way in life after the glory days are long gone, WashDup is a story that finally needs to be told.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 01
programme.desc: Elena Hight is one of the most accomplished women in snowboarding history. Interestingly, her passion for boardsports culture originated in her home state of Hawaii on the island of Kauai. This is where Elena’s Microdose series begins. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Papa Mike, Chris Owen, Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 02
programme.desc: From the moment she strapped into a snowboard, Elena Hight has been an innovative and visionary force in women’s snowboarding. In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we take a look at two of Elena’s greatest achievements. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Scotty Lago and Louie Vito.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Back Yard Boogie
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen rips his back yard on the snow-skate and Rip Zinger...well, yeah he gets creative too.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Torstein Horgmo - Dose 01
programme.desc: Bullying has long term and far too often, fatal effects. Torstein Horgmo is considered to be one of the top five snowboarders to ever strap in and snowboarding quite literally saved his life. Here is where his Microdose story begins.

programme.desc: Le Grand Complet, the third leg of the 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup series is being celebrated in Le Pin au Haras, Normandy. Known as the Versailles for Horses, it provides a fitting location for spectacular competition. Germany is fresh from victory at Strzegom, but France is not ready to lose in home grounds. How will this leg develop?

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Moscow Polo Club vs Hamburger Polo Club
programme.desc: In order to advance to the following rounds, Moscow Polo Club will have to face Hamburger Polo Club in this first stage of the Polo Rider Cup 2021. With a 10/12 goals handicap and 5 chukkers, competition between the strongest polo teams in the world is on at the Polo Club de Chantilly. Enjoy the match between Moscow Polo Club and Hamburger Polo Club.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: They are big, heavy and embody the American way of driving: luxury SUVs like the Cadillac Escalade, classic pick-up trucks like the iconic Ford F-150 or Uber pick-ups like the Dodge RAM.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin V12 Vantage S Roadster with its 6-litre V12 engine is probably the most amazing export from the UK. In addition: a mountain cruise from dawn to sundown with the Corvette C7 Convertible.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Functional transporters offer high payload and lots of storage space, and the new Volkswagen Crafter is no exception. How does it fare in comparison to the iconic Mercedes Sprinter? Also: the nearly indestructible and also iconic Unimog by Mercedes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayman GT4 combined the best elements that Porsche could offer. In addition: the Audi R8 V10 plus, an even stronger, lighter and faster version of the original model.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The tuning company MTM went to work on Audi's already super-powerful S8 luxury sedan and created the S8 Talladega R. Alpina's B6 Biturbo Gran Coupe easily beats its BMW counterpart and makes the road vibrate.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the 6th generation of two US classics, the Ford Mustang GT and the Chevrolet Corvette Z06, these iconic sports cars' history and development over the past decades.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the i8, BMW tried to show the automotive world that they were ahead of their time. But why would anybody pay much more for a car that’s slower and less affordable than the brand's M4 and less spacious than the M5?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Volvo S90 offers Scandinavian elegance and a high level of security features. Jaguar entered the race with its performance sedan XF-S and Cadillac ramped up their luxury level with the CT6.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: In Tokyo, Denmark's Viktor Axelsen surprised a billion Chinese by winning the badminton gold medal, Valerie Adams brought Kiwi athleticism into the spotlight, while the Brownlee brothers realised a historic triathlon double.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the greatest stars of combat sports, such as the British boxer Kell Brook, or the veteran Bernard Hopkins. Plus, discover the tattoos of some fighters, while Ronda Rousey has some great news to announce!

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the biggest world fighters, such as UFC champion Ovince Saint Preux or former boxer Mike Tyson. Plus, a look at the acting career of Michael Bisping and the man who has made UFC a success.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the world's best fighters, including heavyweight boxers Anthony Joshua and Wladimir Klitschko, as well as Ricky Hatton's big comeback and the greatest trash talker of all time, Muhammad Ali.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the greatest champions of combat sports, including the British boxer Tony Bellew. Demi Lovato has found, then lost, love with an MMA star. Plus, meet the champions who are still fighting at the age of 40.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the greatest champions of combat sports, among them the Kazakh boxer Gennady Golovkin. The rapper Stormzy is a big boxing fan. Conor McGregor takes up a new challenge. UFC champion Henderson retires.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: Find out about the best fighters in combat sports, including David Hayes, who makes his return to the ring, and Demetrious Johnson, who has several UFC titles to defend. Tyson Fury is the king of trash talk, and Shannon Brigs plays Santa Claus.

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: Romelu Lukaku takes his chance while the heirs of Schmeichel make a name for themselves.

programme.title: Chill
programme.desc: Chill meets freeskier Drew Tabke to talk about the important business of choosing the best line. Afterwards Chill goes to Kirkwood in the USA for the Freerie World Tour and finally to the mobile snow piste in Austria.

programme.title: Sports Woman
programme.desc: Laura Trott has won more medals than any British athlete, and she has won the heart of her Olympic champion colleague Jason Kenny.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: The United States national women's team has placed women's professional football on a pedestal.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: En Route America
programme.desc: A road trip across the West Coast, following skiers as they explore iconic mountains and chase winter conditions across the United States.

programme.title: En Route Departure
programme.desc: Follow Pep Fujas, Blake Nyman, Anthony Boronowski, Dylan Hood, Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and more as they chase storms from a Top Secret Military Mountain Warfare Facility, to the Italian Alps.

programme.title: Falling Angels
programme.desc: Three female BASE jumpers trek deep into the Venezuelan jungle to attempt a historic jump from the world’s highest waterfall, facing extreme terrain, technical challenges, and one of the most dangerous exits in the sport.

programme.title: Gunnie Season
programme.desc: An extreme skiing film featuring some of the world’s top professional skiers pushing their limits on snow and steep terrain.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 1
programme.desc: As soon as we arrive on the island, we begin to explore Zanzibar starting in the northern part of the country. Nungwi, our chosen location is a common touristic destination and its guests are famously welcoming. Let's begin our journey by visiting the famous sea turtle conservation and protection center. Buckle up for this adventure!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4
programme.desc: Vodice is a famous tourist destination known for many breathtaking beaches and vibrant and rich offer of all tourist attractions. It is known for its liveliness and its friendly hosts. Located on the coast in a wide bay, 11 km northwest ofŠibenik, it is the ideal vacation spot for everyone. Check it out in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5
programme.desc: The region of Imotski is a historical name for the area. We are determined in today's episode to visit this region and a town straight out of a fairytale - magical Imotski. We’ll indulge in natural beauties and set off across the sea to the islands of Iž, Molat and Dugi otok. Stay with us and find out more about this wonderful area!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 3
programme.desc: The third event of the GC32 Racing Tour is taking place in Villasimius, in Italy. Taking place in mid-September on Sardinia's southeastern point, the GC32 Racing Tour has worked hard with the authorities to plant here one of the most important international competitions in foiling racing. Will Allinghi continue their winning streak in Italian waters?Find out the best moments of the competition of the GC32 Villasimius World Championship.

programme.title: Indian Rock Fishing

programme.title: Sadomaster
programme.desc: Extreme urban violence reigns in Argentina. Senator Beccar Varela rises as the only way to stop violence with his "zero tolerance" politic. People doesn't suspect that Beccar is the head of the nazi gang that causes the violence. When members of the gang torture and rape a retarded man, a mysterious Masked avenger begins his brutal revenge against the gangs and the corrupt politics.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E05 - The Struggle
programme.desc: Laramy remains stuck at Camp Hell Hole, nursing 7's leg, and struggling to survive in the freezing temperatures without food.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E06 - On the Move
programme.desc: Laramy and Seven leave camp Hell Hole and hit the trail again. They are headed for lower elevation in search of a more permanent place to call home.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E10 - Disaster in the Air
programme.desc: Where the black box is the only story teller…… Airplane crashes are most people’s worst nightmares. Desperate Hours looks at major disasters in aviation history including Malaysia Airlines MH17 and MH370, Air France Flight 447, Germanwings Flight 9525, the Tenerife airport disaster, the Challenger and Columbia space shuttle disasters, the 2015 Sumatra Indonesian Air Force C-130 crash, the 1997 Irkutsk Antonov An-124 crash, and the Concorde Flight 4590 crash.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E11 - Road and Rail Disasters
programme.desc: Buckle up and stay vigilant…… Desperate Hours looks at road and train accidents including the Spanish train accident in Santiago De Compostella, a road accident in Pakistan, an oil truck crash in Nigeria that killed 96 people, the Queen of the Sea train accident in Sri Lanka, accidents caused by fog in Italy and the UK, an one hundred vehicle accident on the A1 Motorway in Austria, a road accident in Mexico, and an Amtrak accident in the United States.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E12 - Environmental Disaster
programme.desc: Better safe than sorry…… Desperate Hours takes a look at the Kyoto Protocol and the danger of rising sea levels. The programme looks at the causes of environmental disasters including landfill waste, the great Pacific Garbage Patch, oil spills, air pollution, and the destruction of the rain forest as well as the destructive effects of environmental disasters including ozone depletion and rising temperatures in the arctic.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E01 - Lost!
programme.desc: Nick and Laura subject themselves to intense survival training with the Survival Training School of California deep in the mountains.

programme.title: Try Higher

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Ricardo again manages to confuse Don Lucio so that he does not find out about the million dollars missing from his account. Gertrudis sees that Lorena will not be able to execute her husband because she fell in love with Alberto. Malena confesses to her father that Pablo tried to abuse her again and that she is going to separate from him. Elvis ends his relationship with Virginia. Lorena continues to run away with her son Ignacio.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: In a corner of the park, hidden and watching them, is Guillermo who took his son. Downcast, Lorena asks Alberto not to worry about her anymore. Carmen is unaware of Virginia's pregnancy. Once again, Pedro leaves Lorena with no way out, ordering her to shoot straight at Marco Aurelio's heart if she does not want to end up recognizing her son's corpse in a morgue - Elvis desperately asks Ricardo for help to get rid of the baby Virginia is expecting.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Clara Inés, determined, decrees that she will unveil the mysteries of the Santa Maria mansion one by one.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Missing her, Israel takes Pastora to a five-star hotel, where she informs Clara Inés that she has been thrown out of the Santa María mansion because she is now its owner.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana receives a call from Carlos Raul to inform her that Azalea woke up and accused her before the police of having shot him.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Santiago tells Adriana that thanks to Azalea's psychiatric medical report, the judge agreed to release her on bail. Carlos Raul shows up at that moment.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Inspector Torrealba demands that Rosa testify about what happened in the past crime of Leoncio Lopez Mendez. With pain she relives the moments when Ezequiel arrived and murdered Leoncio and then left the place without any remorse. Fausto and Ezequiel continue with their plan to murder Rosa Blanco so that she does not tell what she knows.

programme.title: COMO TE AFECTA
programme.desc: Programa que conecta al público con temas de actualidad global , ofreciendo una visión informada de la "Aldea Global."

programme.title: CONECTADOS
programme.desc: Programa religioso que ofrece enseñanzas y reflexiones sobre la fe.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Reto Sangriento
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes investigadores de fenómenos paranormales reciben el reto de pasar un fin de semana en una casa donde habitan seres malignos. Esto con el fin de presentar las evidencias en su programa de televisión y levantar el rating, pero lo que no saben es que el reto les costara muy caro.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: ¿Quieres Ser Mi Rehén?
programme.desc: Ulises, un diseñador publicitario, es tomado como rehén por una hermosa y misteriosa mujer en el día más importante de su vida y en su propia oficina. Al mismo tiempo, la exesposa de Ulises acude a su oficina y complica todavía más la situación.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
